tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, indicating prediabetes. Lipid profile reveals marked hypercholesterolemia, high LDL, and low HDL, which significantly increases cardiovascular risk. Renal function, electrolytes, and glucose are within normal limits. Recommend further evaluation and management of dyslipidemia and glycemic control, along with lifestyle modification.
Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
